name: XILINX INC. Registered Shares D
summary: Xilinx (now part of AMD) was a semiconductor company that designed and developed programmable logic devices (PLDs). Their products included FPGAs (Field-Programmable Gate Arrays), SoCs (System on Chips), and ACAPs (Adaptive Compute Acceleration Platforms). Xilinx was headquartered in San Jose, California before being acquired by AMD.
